query:
-- Adicionar campos de fidelidade na tabela establishments
ALTER TABLE establishments 
ADD COLUMN loyaltyEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN loyaltyStampsRequired INT DEFAULT 6,
ADD COLUMN loyaltyCouponType ENUM('fixed', 'percentage', 'free_delivery') DEFAULT 'fixed',
ADD COLUMN loyaltyCouponValue DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 10.00,
ADD COLUMN loyaltyMinOrderValue DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00;

-- Criar tabela loyaltyCards
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS loyaltyCards (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  establishmentId INT NOT NULL,
  customerPhone VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
  customerName VARCHAR(255),
  password4Hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  stamps INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalStampsEarned INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  couponsEarned INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  activeCouponId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Criar tabela loyaltyStamps
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS loyaltyStamps (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  loyaltyCardId INT NOT NULL,
  orderId INT NOT NULL,
  orderNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  orderTotal DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

ADD COLUMN loyaltyCouponValue DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 10.00,

-- Criar tabela loyaltyCards

  establishmentId INT NOT NULL,
  customerPhone VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
  customerName VARCHAR(255),
  password4Hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  stamps INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,

-- Criar tabela loyaltyStamps
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS loyaltyStamps (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  loyaltyCardId INT NOT NULL,
  orderId INT NOT NULL,
  orderNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  orderTotal DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
